reason: No ARCHITECTURE.md exists in the project. Architecture gaps analysis flags this as 'missing', and without it the team cannot validate implementation decisions against a structural spec. Milestone planning is hampered because acceptance criteria must be inferred from PRD alone.
proposedChange: Create ARCHITECTURE.md documenting: (1) shell execution model and command dispatch, (2) filesystem abstraction layer and backend interfaces (browser/Electron/Node), (3) pipe/stream data flow, (4) error handling contract, (5) permission model.
